text: Capstone thesis, synthesizing the cost model (a-0011) and the call/token decoupling (a-0012; mechanism in a-0015): tool-set granularity helps only at intermediate difficulty - a Goldilocks band whose benefit collapses at both extremes - and the saving comes from cutting reasoning steps, not tool calls. This is the project's headline claim and the launch point for q-0011 (does the band shift with model capability?) and q-0012 (what is the mechanism?). It adds no new evidence of its own; it stands on a-0011/a-0012/a-0015.

comments.role: Capstone / headline synthesis, not a peer finding: restates a-0011 (Goldilocks cost model) + a-0012 (call/token decoupling) + a-0015 (externalization mechanism) at thesis level. Kept because q-0011 and q-0012 derive from it.
